bids.reasoning: At t=0.0 there is no time pressure to concede, so I am targeting my maximum-utility bid. The opponent opened with all valueE, which is the lowest utility for me on every issue and provides no evidence yet of willingness to trade off, so I will anchor on my strongest valid offer.

At t=0.02 it is still very early, so I am targeting a very high-utility bid for myself while avoiding an exact repeat of my previous all-valueA offer. The opponent has only conceded slightly from all valueE to issueA:valueD, so their offers remain very low utility to me and do not yet justify major concessions. I will make a small concession on the lowest-weight issueE while holding firm on the more important issues.

At t=0.04 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making small concessions on the lowest-weight issues. The opponent has improved their offers from all valueE to concessions on issueA and issueB, so they are conceding somewhat, but their bids are still low for my utility; I will hold firm on my most important issues and avoid repeating my previous exact bid.

I targeted a high utility bid around 0.94 because it is still very early in the negotiation and the opponent is already conceding on my most important issues A and B. Their offers have improved for me from all valueE to valueC/valueC on A and B, while they remain firm on C/D/E, so I will make only a small concession on a low-weight issue and avoid repeating my last bid exactly.

At t=0.08 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.92 rather than making major concessions. The opponent has conceded substantially on issueA and issueB but is holding issueC/issueD/issueE at valueE, so I will keep my high-weight issues A/B/C at valueA while conceding modestly on the lower-weight D/E. This also avoids repeating my previous exact bid.

I targeted a high-utility bid around 0.88 because it is still very early, so there is no need to concede heavily yet. The opponent has improved substantially on my high-weight issues A and B but has held firm at valueE on C/D/E, so I am conceding mainly on the lower-weight issues D and E while protecting A, B, and C.

I am targeting a high but slightly more conciliatory utility around 0.84 because it is still early, and the opponent’s offers are clearly improving for my high-weight issues A and B. Their latest valid offer gives me about 0.72, but they have held firm on D and E, which are low-weight for me, so I concede those while keeping issueC at my best value.

I targeted a utility around 0.80, which is a meaningful concession from my prior 0.84 while still preserving my most important issues A and B at their best values. At t=0.14 it is still early, but the opponent has steadily conceded toward my preferences on issueA, issueB, and now issueC, while continuing to signal strong interest in issueD and issueE being valueE, so I concede those low-weight issues fully and offer a midpoint on issueC.

I am targeting about 0.78 utility, since it is still early at t=0.16 and there is no need to accept the opponent’s temporary backslide on issueA. The opponent has steadily moved toward my preferred values on issueA and issueB, while holding issueD and issueE at valueE, so I concede mainly on lower-weight issueD/issueE and offer a compromise on issueC while keeping my highest-weight issues strong.

I targeted a utility around 0.76–0.78, keeping issueA and issueB at my highest values because they are the most important. Time is still early, but the opponent has already conceded substantially toward valueA on issueA and issueB while holding issueD and issueE at valueE, so I concede the low-weight issues and ask for issueC at valueC, which they have already offered before.

I am targeting about 0.78 utility, since it is still early at t=0.20 and the opponent has already shown willingness to offer bids worth around 0.76 to me. Their concessions have mostly moved on high-weight issueA and issueB while they hold issueD/issueE at valueE, so I concede mainly on those lower-weight issues while keeping issueA and issueB at my best values. This also avoids repeating my immediately previous bid exactly.

I targeted a utility around 0.78–0.80 because it is still early at t=0.22, so I should not drop to the opponent’s latest 0.66-utility offer yet. The opponent has conceded substantially on issueA and issueB but is holding issueD and issueE at valueE, so I concede those low-weight issues while keeping the high-weight issues strong and offering a modest improvement on issueC.

I am targeting a utility around 0.76, keeping my highest-weight issues A and B at valueA while conceding the low-weight D and E fully and moving C to valueC. The opponent has steadily improved offers to me on A/B but continues to hold D/E at valueE and C around valueD, so this bid tests a moderate concession without giving up too much this early at t=0.24.

I am targeting a utility around 0.72, conceding mainly on lower-importance issueD/issueE and partially on issueC while holding firm on the high-weight issueA and issueB. At t=0.26 there is still time, but the opponent’s offers have moved significantly toward my preferred values on issueA and issueB while consistently pushing issueC/issueD/issueE lower, so this bid tests a reasonable middle ground without giving up the most important issues.
